Travel Aggregators & Fare Price Scraping

Upgrade your fare price scraping and travel aggregation platforms with Ziny’s Residential and Datacenter proxies. Get real-time pricing details for flights, hotel stays and rental cars without facing IP blocks or restrictions. The solution excels in developing strong price comparison tools and boosting profits with regional price tracking.
Buy Proxies for Scraping & Travel Aggregators

Anonymity & Secure

Anonymous and mask your IP from any website with sticky or rotating proxies, a ghost on the web….

No Geo-Restrictions

Collect data from 195+ countries.
No limitations

Bypass CAPTCHAs

Proxies to bypass CAPTCHA verification, never get you IP blocked, collect data seamlessly.

Simple Dashboard

Easy way to customize, monitor, manage your proxies with our dashboard. Any beginner can use and manage their proxies, if needed 24/7 support

Personal Account Manager

Upgrade your account plan and have a personal account manager. Developer services are also available, contact us.

Proxy Speed

Extremely fast and reliable rotating and dedicated IPs supported for any use case.

Unlock Global Travel Data Safely

Travel data is everywhere. Airlines, hotels, OTAs, deals popping up across the globe. But scraping that data safely isn’t simple. IPs get blocked. Dashboards freeze. Accounts get flagged when multiple logins come from the same location. Automation scripts hit roadblocks.

 

This is where travel aggregator proxies make a difference. They offer opportunity to access fares and hotel rates from anywhere via geo-targeted IP addresses. Rotate IPs to avoid bans and CAPTCHAs. Keep your dashboards and accounts safe. Collect pricing intelligence without interruptions.

 

A regular proxy might let you browse. A Ziny Proxy is tuned for one thing: helping you scrape, manage, and scale travel data safely and efficiently.

Why Ziny Proxy Stands Out for Travel Platforms

Most proxies fail on travel aggregators. Shared pools. Slow speeds. Recycled IPs. Blocks and CAPTCHAs everywhere.

 

Ziny Proxy is built for travel from the ground up. Residential, mobile, rotating, and datacenter proxies that stay reliable. High-speed, stable connections. Smooth integration with bots, dashboards, and reporting pipelines. Geo-targeted IPs that let you see real local pricing.

 

Here’s what you get with Ziny Proxy:

 

  • Geo-targeted IPs from 190+ countries
  • SOCKS5 & HTTPS support
  • Unlimited bandwidth, 1 Gb/s speed
  • Rotating and sticky sessions for multi-account stability
  • Instant activation after checkout
  • Automation-ready for bots and scripts
  • Whether you manage one OTA dashboard or fifty, Ziny Proxy keeps performance consistent.

Trusted by Travel Teams Worldwide

Companies rely on Ziny Proxy because it meets their needs. Multi-account management. Safe automation. Real-time fare scraping. Geo-specific monitoring.

 

Scaling is easy since we offer flexible proxy pools and unlimited bandwidth that makes expansion seamless. Support is always available, 24/7. If a proxy fails, we replace it or refund it. No shortcuts, no excuses.

THE COMPETITIVE EDGE FOR TRAVEL AGGREGATORS

Travel proxies aren’t just a workaround. They’re the key to account safety, accurate pricing intelligence, and smooth aggregator operations.

 

Ziny Proxy provides that edge. Clean, geo-targeted IPs. Stable uptime. Private, secure connections tailored for travel workflows.

 

That’s why data-driven travel teams don’t just use any proxy. They use Ziny Proxy.

Frequently asked questions

Why Do Travel Aggregators and Price Monitoring Tools Need Proxies?
Travel aggregators and price monitoring tools need proxies to obtain real-time information from airline, hotel, and rental car websites while avoiding IP bans and geo-restrictions. Companies achieve automated high-volume data collection and uninterrupted scraping operations by utilizing Residential and Datacenter proxies which also allow access to region-specific pricing. The system enables precise price comparisons between different travel options while providing competitive analysis and enabling providers to present customers with superior travel deals.
How does Ziny Proxy support OTA automation and dashboards?
By combining rotating proxies for high-speed scripts with sticky/residential proxies for persistent logins, you can safely automate fare collection, dashboard management, and reporting without interruptions or IP bans.
What's the difference between a static residential proxy and a rotating residential proxy?
A static residential proxy gives you a fixed IP address, ideal for maintaining a consistent online identity. A rotating residential proxy automatically cycles through multiple IP addresses, mimicking natural browsing and reducing the risk of detection during high-volume tasks.
What payment methods can I use?

Ziny supports payments through:

 

  • Over 70+ Cryptocurrencies
  • Google Pay
  • Apple Pay
  • Card-based methods (Visa, Mastercard, American Express and more)

 

If you need help using any of these payment methods, feel free to contact us.
